title: Colby Hoff
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses|Hoff}} {{Character |type=Corporate |image= |name=Colby Hoff |homeworld= |birth= |death=By [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]Colby Hoff is [[Death/Legends|dead]] as of the events of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'' novel]], which the ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]. |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children=[[Hoff (Colby Hoff's son)|Hoff]] |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You killed my father. Have you forgotten Colby Hoff?''"
"''You are mistaken, Hoff. Your father committed suicide, as I recall. Stuck a blaster in his mouth and blew the back of his head off, didn't he? Very messy.''"
"''You ruined him!''"
"''We were ''business'' competitors. He gambled that he was smarter than I. A foolish mistake.|Hoff and Prince Xizor|}} '''Colby Hoff''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] and formerly a pesky business competitor of [[Dark Prince|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]],''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{C|"Hoff"}} the [[Underlord|leader]] of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate. After a failed gamble to outsmart Xizor left him ruined,{{CSWECite|II|48|Hoff, Colby}} Colby committed [[Death/Legends|suicide]] by firing a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] into his [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] and blowing off the back of his head. Seeking to avenge his [[Parent/Legends|father's]] death, [[Hoff (Colby Hoff's son)|Hoff's son]] later ambushed Xizor inside a protected corridor on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]. Xizor calmly subdued his assailant and snapped the young man's neck after remarking that Colby Hoff was foolish to have challenged him. ==Behind the scenes== Colby Hoff was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], written by [[Steve Perry]]. The [[1998]] ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and the [[2000]] ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' state that Xizor had Colby Hoff murdered,''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' but the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' later clarified that Hoff committed suicide, which matches the description from the novel. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|cardname=Xizor's Dirty Handiwork|link=https://www.rebelscum.com/photo.asp?image=/sote/soteTC007.jpg}} {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Colby Hoff }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Hoff, Colby}} [[Category:Businesspeople]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]]
